assessment.note: He says feedback helps but consistency breaks under time pressure, which signals a mild remaining clarity gap around applying the bar in real conditions.

new_queue.label: Time pressure consistency
new_queue.name: Under time pressure, what part slips first for you?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific inconsistency he named so the evidence stays concrete.

new_queue.label: Quality bar
new_queue.name: When you say a brand design is good, what tells you it's good?
new_queue.description: Surfaces Carlos's current internal quality standard and whether it is concrete enough to guide decisions.

new_queue.label: Feedback to action
new_queue.name: What changed in your work after the last round of feedback?
new_queue.description: Checks whether feedback translated into a visible behavior change rather than staying abstract.

new_queue.label: Expectation gap
new_queue.name: Where do my expectations for your work feel different from yours right now?
new_queue.description: Names alignment gaps without assuming the answer, and makes the mismatch discussable.

new_queue.label: Quality friction
new_queue.name: What part of the quality bar feels hardest to apply consistently?
new_queue.description: Finds the specific place where standards break down in practice.

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is getting in the way of the next skill you want to build?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the real constraint on near-term development, whether it's skill, context, or habit.

new_queue.label: Two-week focus
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete change you want to make before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific commitment with a near-term behavioral change.
